The '''Battle of Corulag ''' was a battle in [[Skere Kaan|Kaan's]] campaign to take the [[Bormea sector/Legends|Bormea sector]] for the [[Brotherhood of Darkness/Legends|Brotherhood of Darkness]].

{{Battle-stub}}
